name: Brazilian Church Outreach (MA)
live_band: Prospecting — 32 churches identified, 0 contacted. Call list exists, no outreach motion in the CRM yet.
next_move: Land the four pastor-network hubs first (Pallú, Souza, Mendes, Coelho) — each unlocks 2–3 congregations with a single call. See pastor_networks in knowledge/churches_ma_brazilian_outreach.json.
blockers: 3 churches still missing phone numbers (Spring of Life Framingham, Family UMC Saugus Brazilian, Santo Christo Parish Fall River) — research pass needed before they're callable.
Falmouth Catholic community shows conflicting pastor names across research passes — confirm current priest before cold outreach.
ABBA Church Marlboro lists a +351 (Portugal) number — likely wrong / stale. Verify local line.
Iglesia Emanuel Marlborough has Spanish-language name — confirm Brazilian/Portuguese scope fit or demote.
context: Brazilian/Portuguese-speaking churches in Massachusetts are a high-fit outreach target for Comeketo: church community events (festas, quinceañeras-equivalent, pastor appreciation dinners, youth conferences, fundraisers) map directly onto Comeketo's catering wheelhouse. The ethnic-Brazilian positioning also aligns with brand (see brand and Rodrigo Welcome deck materials — to be indexed).
hypothesis: Concentrated pastor networks (Pallú across 3 SDA congregations, Mendes across 2, etc.) mean a small number of well-run conversations unlock disproportionate pipeline. Efficient outreach > list-blasting.
metrics_to_watch: Churches moved from unworked → contacted (count per week)
Churches moved from contacted → connected (response rate)
Church-sourced events on the calendar (conversion to revenue)
Andre's dials metric on the scorecard — when church outreach is active, this should rise
notes: Source list is Andre's file — the CSV was named 'Brazilian Churches in MA - Andre.csv' explicitly assigning ownership.
Lead-hygiene discipline from the sales scorecard (no-deleting-leads, no-deleting-opportunities) applies — even unresponsive churches stay in the pipeline with a 'dormant' status, not deleted.

sources.diff: Initial project creation from deduped churches knowledge file.
